app.name: SaveMii /ProcessMod
app.long_description:
WiiU/vWii Save and Mii Manager
Original by Ryuzaki-MrL - Mod by GabyPCGeek - WUT Port by DaThinkingChair - /ProcessMod by w3irDv
This homebrew allows you to backup your Wii U and vWii savegames to the SD card and then restore them. You can also backup/restore your Wii U or vWii miis. Up to 256 backups can be made per title. Backups are stored in sd:/wiiu/backups. Savedata can be moved between profiles. All operations can be performed on multiple titles at once.
